homepage.heroSubline: Protect your home from hail and harsh weather. Expert siding installation and repair for lasting beauty and value.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Experience, Focused on Quality
aboutText: Tops Siding Colorado Springs started with a simple goal: to provide homeowners with durable, beautiful siding solutions that stand up to our challenging climate. We're a local team, born and raised right here in the shadow of Pikes Peak, and we understand the unique demands our weather places on your home's exterior.

We believe in doing things right the first time. That means using only the highest quality materials, employing skilled craftsmen, and paying meticulous attention to every detail. We're not just installing siding; we're safeguarding your investment and enhancing your home's curb appeal.

Colorado Springs is our home, and we're committed to giving back to the community that supports us. We actively support local charities and organizations, and we always strive to provide fair, honest service to our neighbors.

valueProps.title: Hail-Resistant Siding
valueProps.description: Protect your home from Colorado's notorious hailstorms with our impact-resistant siding options.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Colorado Springs architecture and climate challenges better than anyone.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get a Free Siding Quote Today!
homepage.ctaSubline: Protect your home and enhance its beauty. Contact us now for a free consultation.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional siding installation for lasting protection and curb appeal.
services.description:
New siding installation is a significant investment, and we treat it as such. We start with a thorough assessment of your home's needs, considering factors like architectural style, exposure to the elements, and your personal preferences. We offer a wide range of siding materials, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal, each with its own unique advantages. 

Our skilled installation team ensures precise measurements, proper flashing, and secure fastening, all crucial for long-term performance. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless, weather-tight finish that enhances your home's value and protects it from the elements. Living in Colorado Springs, we know that UV damage is a real problem, which is why we use only the most durable and UV-resistant siding products that are available on the market. We also take into account the risk of hail and extreme weather. 

From initial consultation to final inspection, we're committed to providing a smooth, stress-free experience. We keep you informed every step of the way and address any concerns promptly and professionally.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation and Home Assessment
Step 2: Material Selection and Quote Presentation
Step 3: Precise Measurement and Preparation
Step 4: Professional Siding Installation and Inspection

faq.question: How long does a siding installation project typically take?
faq.answer: Most siding installation projects take between 1-2 weeks, depending on the size and complexity of the home and the type of siding being installed. We always provide a detailed timeline upfront.

faq.question: What type of siding is best for Colorado Springs weather?
faq.answer: Fiber cement and vinyl siding are both excellent choices for Colorado Springs. They are durable, weather-resistant, and can withstand the harsh sun and occasional hail.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make your siding project more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

services.name: Siding Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert siding repair to restore your home's protection and beauty.
services.description:
Damaged siding compromises your home's protection and aesthetic appeal. Whether it's from hail damage, wind, age, or impact, we offer comprehensive siding repair services to restore your home to its original condition. We handle all types of siding repairs, from replacing individual panels to addressing larger areas of damage. 

Our experienced technicians are skilled at identifying the root cause of the problem and implementing effective, long-lasting solutions. We carefully match the existing siding to ensure a seamless repair that blends in perfectly. We understand that even small cracks or holes in the siding can lead to bigger problems down the road, such as water damage and mold growth. 

We prioritize prompt, reliable service to minimize further damage and protect your investment. We'll assess the damage, provide a clear explanation of the repair options, and offer a fair, competitive quote. In areas like Briargate that have newer homes, matching the existing siding is important to maintain the neighborhood aesthetic.
process: Step 1: Thorough Damage Assessment
Step 2: Material Matching and Repair Plan
Step 3: Expert Siding Repair and Replacement
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of siding damage include cracks, holes, loose panels, discoloration, and water stains. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your siding inspected promptly.

faq.question: Can you match the existing siding on my house?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience matching existing siding materials and colors. We'll work diligently to ensure a seamless repair that blends in perfectly.

faq.question: What is the cost of siding repair?
faq.answer: The cost of siding repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the type of siding. We offer free estimates to provide you with a clear understanding of the repair costs.

services.name: Siding Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete siding replacement for a fresh look and enhanced protection.
services.description:
When siding is severely damaged or outdated, complete replacement is often the best option. We offer comprehensive siding replacement services to transform your home and provide lasting protection. We'll remove your old siding, address any underlying issues, and install new siding that meets your specific needs and preferences. 

We offer a wide selection of siding materials, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal, each with its own unique benefits and aesthetic appeal. Our experienced team will guide you through the selection process, helping you choose the perfect siding to complement your home's style and architecture. For example, in Old Colorado City, homeowners often choose siding that matches the historic character of the neighborhood.

We prioritize quality craftsmanship and attention to detail, ensuring a seamless, weather-tight installation that enhances your home's value and protects it from the elements. We understand that siding replacement is a significant investment, and we're committed to providing a transparent, stress-free experience.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive Inspection and Consultation
Step 2: Material Selection and Design
Step 3: Professional Siding Removal and Preparation
Step 4: Expert Siding Installation and Quality Assurance

faq.question: How long does siding replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of a siding replacement project depends on the size and complexity of the home, but typically takes between 1-3 weeks.

faq.question: What are the benefits of new siding?
faq.answer: New siding can increase your home's value, improve its energy efficiency, enhance its curb appeal, and protect it from the elements.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on your siding replacement services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both materials and workmanship, providing you with peace of mind.

services.name: Vinyl Siding
services.shortDescription: Durable and affordable vinyl siding options for Colorado Springs homes.
services.description:
Vinyl siding is a popular choice for Colorado Springs homeowners seeking a cost-effective and low-maintenance siding solution. It's durable, weather-resistant, and available in a wide variety of colors and styles. We offer a wide selection of vinyl siding options to suit any home and budget. 

Our experienced team ensures professional installation for maximum performance and longevity. We use only high-quality vinyl siding products that are designed to withstand Colorado's harsh climate, including extreme temperatures, hail, and UV exposure. Vinyl siding is also easy to clean and maintain, making it a great choice for busy homeowners. In areas like Northgate, where homes are newer, vinyl siding offers a modern aesthetic.

We're committed to providing our customers with the best possible vinyl siding experience, from initial consultation to final inspection. We'll help you choose the perfect vinyl siding to complement your home's style and protect it for years to come.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Vinyl Siding Selection
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Preparation
Step 3: Professional Vinyl Siding Installation
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance
benefits: Wide Variety of Colors and Styles

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 30-40 years.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding can be easily cleaned with soap and water. For tougher stains, you can use a mild household cleaner.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding
services.shortDescription: Durable and fire-resistant fiber cement siding for lasting protection.
services.description:
Fiber cement siding is a premium siding option known for its exceptional durability, fire resistance, and aesthetic appeal. It's made from a composite material of cement, sand, and cellulose fibers, making it incredibly strong and resistant to damage from hail, wind, and insects. We offer a wide selection of fiber cement siding options, including various textures and colors to complement any home. 

Our experienced team ensures professional installation for maximum performance and longevity. We use only high-quality fiber cement siding products that are designed to withstand Colorado's harsh climate. Fiber cement siding is also fire-resistant, providing an extra layer of protection for your home. Given the dry climate in Colorado Springs, this is a desirable feature for many residents.

We're committed to providing our customers with the best possible fiber cement siding experience, from initial consultation to final inspection. We'll help you choose the perfect fiber cement siding to enhance your home's beauty and protect it for years to come.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Fiber Cement Siding Selection
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Preparation
Step 3: Professional Fiber Cement Siding Installation
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance

faq.question: How long does fiber cement siding last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, fiber cement siding can last for 50+ years.

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding more expensive than vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding is typically more expensive than vinyl siding, but it offers superior durability and longevity.

faq.question: Does fiber cement siding require painting?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding comes pre-painted, but it can be repainted to change the color or refresh the look.

services.name: Siding Inspection
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive siding inspections to identify and address potential issues.
services.description:
Regular siding inspections are crucial for maintaining the integrity of your home's exterior. Our comprehensive siding inspection services help identify potential issues early on, preventing costly repairs down the road. Our experienced inspectors will thoroughly examine your siding for signs of damage, including cracks, holes, loose panels, water stains, and insect infestation. 

We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations for repair or replacement. We use advanced tools and techniques to ensure a thorough and accurate assessment of your siding's condition. We understand the unique challenges that Colorado Springs weather poses to siding, and we're equipped to identify and address those issues effectively. 

Whether you're buying, selling, or simply maintaining your home, a professional siding inspection can provide valuable peace of mind.
process: Step 1: Schedule a Siding Inspection
Step 2: Thorough On-Site Inspection
Step 3: Detailed Inspection Report
Step 4: Recommendations for Repair or Replacement

faq.question: How often should I have my siding inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your siding inspected at least once a year, especially after severe weather events.

faq.question: What is included in a siding inspection?
faq.answer: A siding inspection includes a thorough examination of your siding for signs of damage, including cracks, holes, loose panels, water stains, and insect infestation.

faq.question: How much does a siding inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a siding inspection varies depending on the size and complexity of the home. Contact us for a free quote.

We understand the unique challenges that Colorado's weather presents, and we're committed to providing durable, beautiful siding solutions that protect your home for years to come. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Tops Siding did an amazing job installing new fiber cement siding on our home in Broadmoor. The crew was professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. Our house looks fantastic, and we feel much more protected from the elements. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We had some hail damage on our vinyl siding, and Tops Siding came out quickly to assess the damage and provide a repair estimate. They matched the existing siding perfectly, and the repair is seamless. Great service!

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: After years of dealing with old, outdated siding, we decided to replace it with new vinyl siding from Tops Siding. The entire process was smooth and stress-free. The team was knowledgeable and helped us choose the perfect siding for our home. Very happy with the results!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: As a first-time homebuyer, I wanted to make sure the siding was in good condition. Tops Siding provided a thorough inspection and gave me peace of mind. Their detailed report helped me understand the condition of the siding and plan for future maintenance.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We chose Tops Siding for our new vinyl siding installation, and we're very pleased with the results. The crew was professional, the price was competitive, and the siding looks great. A solid local company.

reviews.name: Brian S.
reviews.text: Tops Siding did an excellent job installing fiber cement siding on our house. The crew was meticulous and professional, and the finished product is beautiful. We're confident that our new siding will protect our home for years to come.
